title: mkcw: remove entrypoint binaries
body:
Remove generated entrypoint binaries needed to generated confidential container image and add them to `.gitignore`

#### What this PR does / why we need it:
Following binaries are always generated with build instruction, there shouldn't be any need to keep them in repo since source is already there also when `embed` directory ( in any case ) is empty on `make` it leaves un-tracked changes in the `git status` which looks unneeded.

#### How to verify it
